mapper.sql: id, member_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, province, city, district, detail_address, is_default, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ums_address (member_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, province, city, district, detail_address, is_default) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{detailAddress}, #{isDefault})
mapper.update: UPDATE ums_address SET receiver_name = #{receiverName}, receiver_phone = #{receiverPhone}, province = #{province}, city = #{city}, district = #{district}, detail_address = #{detailAddress}, is_default = #{isDefault} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ums_address WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, create_time DESC
SELECT FROM ums_address WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND is_default = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE ums_address SET is_default = 0 WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
UPDATE ums_address SET is_default = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ums_address WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
